form.formComment: Resuming after three-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into third behind River Storm at Melton over 1720m in a 2yo 10 0K on December 27 at $31. Draws the inside and readied with a trial win so look for a good return.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide without cover from the 800m mark.
Held up for clear running during the latter stages of the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up ran on from midfield and won by 13 m as favourite (Sr3) at Bendigo (1:55.70) beating Dusty Philtra in 2yo MAIDEN on October 28 at $1.35. Primed for this with a recent trial win and draws for a winning return.

form.formComment: 4th (Fr1) over 1750m after showing early speed at Swan Hill was 5th-8.4 at the bell, beaten 5.5 m by Happenstbabeachboy (2:06.10) in NR 45 to 50 on March 31 at $14. Before that 8th (Sr4) over 2150m after being wide early at Bendigo, beaten 24 m by Home And Dry (2:38.10) in NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $14. Looking to others.
